revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Lua|Module:String}} {{template shortcut|br|brk|crlf}} Replaces
where this is unsuitable, for example the rare cases where it is necessary to duplicate

which will be "fixed" by bots. Also avoids HTML mark-up in articles. == Usage == * {{tlx|break}} = one
* {{tlx|break|5}} =




The parameter can be any integer. {{tlc|br}}, {{tlc|brk}} and {{tlc|crlf}} are also redirects (shortcuts), and may be used instead. == See also == * {{tlx|Break lines}} * {{tlx|Clear}} (shortcuts: {{tlc|-}} and {{tlc|clr}}) * {{tlx|Paragraph break}} * [[Help:Line-break handling]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Line-handling templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia XHTML tag-replacing templates]] [[Category:Inline spacing templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Lua|Module:String}} {{template shortcut|br|brk|crlf}} Replaces
where this is unsuitable, for example the rare cases where it is necessary to duplicate

which will be "fixed" by bots. Also avoids HTML mark-up in articles. == Usage == * {{tlx|break}} = one
* {{tlx|break|5}} =




The parameter can be any integer. {{tlc|br}}, {{tlc|brk}} and {{tlc|crlf}} are also redirects (shortcuts), and may be used instead. == See also == * {{tlx|Break lines}} * {{tlx|Clear}} (shortcuts: {{tlc|-}} and {{tlc|clr}}) * {{tlx|Paragraph break}} * [[Help:Line-break handling]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Line-handling templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia XHTML tag-replacing templates]] [[Category:Inline spacing templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 4 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23127601988|commit triggered pipeline]]

where this is unsuitable, for example the rare cases where it is necessary to duplicate

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Break%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Lua|Module:String}} {{template shortcut|br|brk|crlf}} Replaces
where this is unsuitable, for example the rare cases where it is necessary to duplicate

which will be "fixed" by bots. Also avoids HTML mark-up in articles. == Usage == * {{tlx|break}} = one
* {{tlx|break|5}} =




The parameter can be any integer. {{tlc|br}}, {{tlc|brk}} and {{tlc|crlf}} are also redirects (shortcuts), and may be used instead. == See also == * {{tlx|Break lines}} * {{tlx|Clear}} (shortcuts: {{tlc|-}} and {{tlc|clr}}) * {{tlx|Paragraph break}} * [[Help:Line-break handling]] {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Line-handling templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia XHTML tag-replacing templates]] [[Category:Inline spacing templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
